authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(51) — Golden Trout Wilderness Area (Tulare Co.)
sources.quotedText: (51) Golden Trout Wilderness Area (Tulare Co.), excluding the main stem Kern River (see subsection (b)(69)), and the Tule River drainage (see subsection (b)(154)). All year. Only artificial lures may be used. 2 trout

sources.title: CDFW — Fishing for California Golden Trout (native)
USDA Forest Service — Sequoia National Forest: Golden Trout Wilderness
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: Applies to all waters within the Golden Trout Wilderness Area (Tulare Co.), excluding the main stem Kern River (separate entry, 7.50(b)(69)) and the Tule River drainage (separate entry, 7.50(b)(154)).
Only artificial lures may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures may be used; bait fishing prohibited
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: The table entry sets a 2-trout daily bag limit; per 14 CCR 7.50(a)(4), unless otherwise provided it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit, so the possession limit also equals 2.

parameters.note: This entry excludes the main stem Kern River (governed separately at 14 CCR 7.50(b)(69)) and the entire Tule River drainage (governed separately at 14 CCR 7.50(b)(154)); those waters are not covered by this Golden Trout Wilderness Area rule.

regulations.humanSummary: Excludes the main stem Kern River and the Tule River drainage, which are regulated under separate table entries.
regulations.verbatimText: excluding the main stem Kern River (see subsection (b)(69)), and the Tule River drainage (see subsection (b)(154))

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
